hero.title: Build smarter with AI-driven estimates
hero.subtitle: Plan, estimate and manage construction projects on one premium, modern platform — powered by AI.

services.title: Everything you need to build with confidence
services.subtitle: From first idea to handover, our tools cover the full construction lifecycle.

consult.title: Consultation
consult.description: Capture client requirements and turn them into a clear, structured brief.

estimate.title: AI estimates
estimate.description: Generate detailed renovation cost estimates in minutes with AI assistance.

design.title: Design references
design.description: Browse curated reference projects to align on style and budget.

manage.title: Project management
manage.description: Track every project, cost and revision from a single dashboard.

library.title: Material library
library.description: Maintain up-to-date unit prices for materials and labour.

support.title: AI assistant
support.description: Get instant answers and guidance from the built-in chatbot.

process.title: Create a reference estimate in 4 steps
process.subtitle: A guided flow that takes you from requirements to a shareable cost estimate.

step1.title: Define the space
step1.description: Choose the room type, area and scope of the renovation.

step2.title: Pick references
step2.description: Select design references that match your taste and budget.

step3.title: Review the estimate
step3.description: AI breaks down materials and labour into a detailed cost estimate.

step4.title: Save & share
step4.description: Export to PDF or save the project to revisit and refine later.

projects.title: Reference projects to inspire your build
projects.subtitle: Explore real renovations with transparent scope and budgets.
